items.key: loai_sd = '2' and (ma_dvcs = '{$%c[ma_dvcs]}' or ma_dvcs = '') and (lstuser = '' or charindex(rtrim(@@userName) + ',', replace(lstuser, ' ', '') + ',') > 0) and status = '1'
items.check: loai_sd = '2' and (ma_dvcs = '{$%c[ma_dvcs]}' or ma_dvcs = '') and (lstuser = '' or charindex(rtrim(@@userName) + ',', replace(lstuser, ' ', '') + ',') > 0)

footer.v: 1 - Lọc theo người sử dụng, 0 - Không

dir.commands:
declare @unitName nvarchar(256) select @unitName = case when @@language = 'v' then ten_dvcs else ten_dvcs2 end from dmdvcs where ma_dvcs = @@unit select 'this._unitCode=''' + @@unit + ''';this._unitName=''' + replace(replace(isnull(@unitName, ''), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''';set$Form$DefaultValue(this);this._$admin=' + rtrim(@@admin) as message return
&XMLWhenFilterLoading; &XMLWhenFilterClosing;
declare @p int, @v bit, @e char(1), @t char(1) select @p = a.dich_vu_hddt from tkhddt a join tkhddtdv b on a.ma_kn = b.ma_kn where b.ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs and b.status = 1 select @e = rtrim(a.kieu_ky_so) from dmkysohddt a join tkhddtdv b on a.ma_kn = b.ma_kn where b.ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs and b.status = 1 select @e = case when @e is null then case when exists(select 1 from options where name = 'm_ky_hddt' and val = '1') then '1' else '0' end else @e end select @t = rtrim(a.kieu_ph) from dmkieuphhddt a join tkhddtdv b on a.ma_kn = b.ma_kn where b.ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs and b.status = 1 select @t = case when @t is null then case when exists(select 1 from options where name = 'm_import_hddt' and val = '1') then '1' else '0' end else @t end exec FastBusiness$EInvoice$GetOptions 'm_multi_check', @ma_dvcs, @v output
select '' as message, '' as field, 'var g = this.grid;g._unitProvider=' + rtrim(isnull(@p, 0)) + ';g._allowMultiCheck=' + rtrim(@v) + ';g._use$Token=' + rtrim(@e) + ';g._import$Invoice=' + rtrim(@t) + ';remove$GridReport$Filter(g);' as script return
exec rs_LoadESTran @ngay_ct1, @ngay_ct2, @so_ct1, @so_ct2, @maxLength, @ma_kh, @ma_kho, @ma_khon, @ma_nt, @ma_ct, @xu_ly, @ma_dvcs, @user_id0, @@language, @@userID, @@admin, 1, @adjust_mode

action.text: declare @c0 nvarchar(1024), @c1 nvarchar(1024) if exists (select 1 from dmnkhddt where ma_nk = @ma_nk) begin select mau_so, ky_hieu from dmnkhddt where ma_nk = @ma_nk return end
declare @c nvarchar(1024) select @c = ten_ct%l from dmct where ma_ct = @ma_ct select isnull(@c, '') as c return
declare @u bit, @v bit exec FastBusiness$EInvoice$GetOptions 'k_nk_hddt', @ma_dvcs, @u output exec FastBusiness$EInvoice$GetOptions 'm_preview', @ma_dvcs, @v output select @u as u, @v as v return
